critical.mandate: Document the reason for course correction
Update sprint plan and status files after adjustment
New stories injected into sprint must already exist in epics-and-stories.md

step.title: Load Sprint Context
step.action: Read current sprint plan and sprint-status.yaml
Read {planning_artifacts}/epics-and-stories.md — identify stories NOT yet in any sprint

Load retro files from {implementation_artifacts}/retro-*.md if available — check if the current issue matches a known pattern from past retrospectives. If a match is found, note it: "This issue was flagged in retro-{sprint_id}: {finding}. Previous recommendation: {recommendation}."

step.title: Identify Change
step.ask: What needs to change and why?
step.action: Classify: scope change, priority shift, blocker resolution, resource change, new story injection
step.ask: Is this linked to a change request? If so, provide the CR ID.

step.title: Impact Analysis
step.action: Identify affected stories
Assess dependency implications
Estimate impact on sprint timeline
If new story injection: verify story exists in epics-and-stories.md. If not, recommend /gaia-add-stories first.

step.title: Propose Adjustment
step.action: Re-scope sprint: add/remove/reprioritize stories
If injecting new stories: show velocity impact — what must be removed to fit?
Propose updated timeline
Get user approval for changes

step.title: Create Story Files for Injected Stories
step.action: For each newly injected story without a story file:
Recommend: "Run /gaia-create-story {story_key} in a new terminal to elaborate before development"
Or: create minimal entry in sprint-status.yaml with status 'backlog'

step.title: Generate Updated Plan
step.action: Format change summary with standard header: "## Course Correction — {date}" followed by summary line: "Change Type: {type} | Stories Affected: {count} | Velocity Impact: {delta} points"
Update sprint plan document
Update sprint-status.yaml with changes — include any newly injected stories
Log course correction reason, CR ID (if applicable), and changes made

Extract all action items from the course correction. For each action item record: description, responsible agent or role, target date, status (open). Write these to sprint-status.yaml under a `correction_action_items` list. Each entry: {id: CA-{NNN}, description, assigned_to, due_date, status: open}.
If sprint-status.yaml already has a `correction_action_items` section: append new items, do not overwrite existing ones.
step.template-output: Update sprint plan and status files with course correction changes and rationale.

step.title: Update Change Request Status
step.action: If CR ID provided: read {planning_artifacts}/change-request-{cr_id}.md
Update status from OPEN to IN-SPRINT or BACKLOGGED
Record which sprint and stories are implementing this change
